channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SMIFS] Vivaan and Keya Trust Acquire 37,266 Shares of Nexome Capital Markets Ltd
item.description:
Vivaan and Keya Trust have acquired 37,266 shares of Nexome Capital Markets Ltd. This acquisition increases their holding to 1.27% of the total voting rights. The shares were acquired on March 24, 2026. The total equity share capital of the company after the acquisition stands at Rs. 8,81,55,000.

  • Vivaan and Keya Trust have acquired 37,266 shares of Nexome Capital Markets Ltd.
  • This acquisition increases their holding to 1.27% of the total voting rights.
  • The shares were acquired on March 24, 2026.
  • The total equity share capital of the company after the acquisition stands at Rs. 8,81,55,000.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SMIFS CAPITAL MARKETS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SMIFS] Promoter Utsav Parekh Acquires Equity Shares of Nexome Capital Markets Ltd
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 7(2) of SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015, Mr. Utsav Parekh, a promoter of Nexome Capital Markets Ltd (formerly SMIFS Capital Markets Limited), has acquired equity shares of the company. The acquisition was made in March 2026 through a rights issue. The total number of equity shares acquired by Mr. Parekh is 48,100, which amounts to approximately 1.64% of the total paid-up equity shares of the company.

  • Mr. Utsav Parekh, a promoter of Nexome Capital Markets Ltd, has acquired equity shares of the company.
  • The acquisition was made in March 2026 through a rights issue.
  • The total number of equity shares acquired by Mr. Parekh is 48,100.
  • This acquisition represents approximately 1.64% of the total paid-up equity shares of the company.
  • The value of the transaction excludes taxes, brokerage, and any other charges.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SMIFS CAPITAL MARKETS LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [SHARDACROP] Sharda Cropchem Ltd Trading Window to Close from 1st April, 2026
item.description:
Sharda Cropchem Ltd has announced that the trading window will be closed from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended on 31st March, 2026 are approved by the Board of Directors and filed with Stock Exchanges. This closure is as per the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider trading.

  • Sharda Cropchem Ltd to close trading window from 1st April, 2026
  • Closure due to approval of audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended on 31st March, 2026
  • Closure as per Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider trading to be followed

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sharda Cropchem Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ODIGMA] Odigma Consultancy Solutions Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure Until After Q4 and FY26 Results
item.description:
Odigma Consultancy Solutions Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the securities of the company. The closure will commence from Friday, March 27, 2026, and will remain in effect until 48 hours after the declaration of the Financial Results for the quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026. The exact date of the announcement of the Financial Results is yet to be informed.

  • Trading window closure announced by Odigma Consultancy Solutions Ltd
  • Closure to commence from March 27, 2026
  • To remain in effect until 48 hours after Q4 and FY26 results announcement
  • Date of results announcement yet to be informed
  • In accordance with SEBI regulations and the company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Odigma Consultancy Solutions Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CELLO] Cello World Ltd Closes Trading Window Until After Q4 Results for FY26
item.description:
Cello World Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all Directors, Officers, Designated Employees, Insiders, and their immediate relatives. This closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading. The trading window will remain closed from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, till the end of 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Standalone & Consolidated Financial Results of the Company for the fourth quarter and year ending on March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration of these results will be intimated in due course.

  • Trading window closure for Directors, Officers, Designated Employees, Insiders, and their immediate relatives
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Closure from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, till the end of 48 hours after Q4 results declaration
  • Applies to Audited Standalone & Consolidated Financial Results for the year ending on March 31, 2026
  • Date of Board Meeting for consideration of results to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cello World Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PASUFIN] Pasupati Fincap Ltd Appoints Mrs. Rakhi Sharma as Independent Director, Considers Scheme of Arrangement and Capital Reduction
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Pasupati Fincap Ltd has appointed Mrs. Rakhi Sharma as a Non-Executive and Independent Director, effective from 26th March 2026. The company also considered a Scheme of Arrangement of Reduction of Share Capital due to accumulated business losses, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals. The company has also approved a change of name to Harmanshi Appliances Co. Limited, subject to approvals. An Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) has been convened for various approvals, including the appointment of Mrs. Rakhi Sharma as an Additional Director for a term of five consecutive years, and the appointment of M/s. Akash & Co. as the Scrutiniser for the remote e-voting and voting during the EGM. The company has fixed Saturday, 18th April 2026, as the 'Cut-off Date' for determining the Members eligible to remote e-voting and attending the General Meeting.

  • Appointment of Mrs. Rakhi Sharma as Non-Executive and Independent Director
  • Consideration of Scheme of Arrangement of Reduction of Share Capital
  • Approval of change of name to Harmanshi Appliances Co. Limited
  • Convening of Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM)
  • Appointment of M/s. Akash & Co. as the Scrutiniser for the remote e-voting and voting during the EGM

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PASUPATI FINCAP LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [STELLAR] Stellar Capital Services Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Stellar Capital Services Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition and Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company’s ‘Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading’. The trading window will be closed for all insiders, including designated persons and their immediate relatives, from Wednesday, April 1, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the company's financial results for the half year and year ended March 31st 2026. The date of the board meeting where the results will be considered will be intimated in due course.

  • Stellar Capital Services Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition and Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Trading window to remain closed for all insiders including designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure from Wednesday, April 1, 2026 until 48 hours after financial results declaration
  • Date of board meeting to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Stellar Capital Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RATEGAIN] RateGain Travel Technologies Grants 67,631 Shares Under Employee Stock Purchase Scheme
item.description:
RateGain Travel Technologies Ltd has approved the offer and grant of 67,631 equity shares under the RateGain Employee Stock Purchase Scheme - 2023. The shares were granted at a price of Rs. 750/- per share, with a lock-in/vesting period of 4 years. The release of shares will be in the following manner: 10% at the end of year 1, 20% at the end of year 2, 30% at the end of year 3, and 40% at the end of year 4. This information is provided as per the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and the SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021.

  • RateGain Travel Technologies grants 67,631 shares under the Employee Stock Purchase Scheme - 2023.
  • The offer/grant price per share is Rs. 750/-.
  • The lock-in/vesting period is 4 years.
  • The release of shares will be in installments over a 4-year period.
  • The announcement is in compliance with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RateGain Travel Technologies Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [KRISHNACAP] Krishna Capital and Securities Ltd: Board Approves Share Capital Increase, Share Purchase Agreement, Preferential Issue, and Director Appointment
item.description:
Krishna Capital and Securities Ltd announced several significant decisions during their board meeting on March 26, 2026. The board approved an increase in the company's authorized share capital, considered and approved the execution of a Share Purchase Agreement, decided to issue, offer, and allot up to 3,00,00,000 Equity Shares on a Preferential Issue basis, and appointed an Additional Executive Director. The board also fixed the day, date, time, and place for the Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) of the Company.

  • Approval of share capital increase from Rs. 4,00,00,000/- to Rs. 34,00,00,000/-
  • Execution of Share Purchase Agreement with Mr. Ashu Jagmalaram Bishnoi and Mr. Yagnik Bharatkumar Tank
  • Proposed acquisition of up to 13,53,892 equity shares by the acquirer
  • Issue of up to 3,00,00,000 Equity Shares on a Preferential Issue basis
  • Appointment of Mr. Vinod Singh as an Additional Director in the Category of Executive Director

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Krishna Capital and Securities Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [AXISCADES] Axiscades Technologies Ltd Appoints Mr. Giridhar Aramane as Additional Non-Executive, Independent Director
item.description:
Axiscades Technologies Ltd has appointed Mr. Giridhar Aramane as an Additional Non-Executive, Independent Director. He is an Indian Administrative Service (IAS) officer of the 1988 batch (Andhra Pradesh cadre) and has over three decades of administrative experience. He has held various key roles at both the central and state levels and currently holds several Board Memberships & Appointments. The appointment is subject to approval of the shareholders in terms of Regulation 17 (1C) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • Appointment of Mr. Giridhar Aramane as Additional Non-Executive, Independent Director
  • Mr. Aramane's extensive administrative experience
  • His current Board Memberships & Appointments
  • Subject to approval of the shareholders in terms of Regulation 17 (1C) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Axiscades Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
